Author: Ninethirty77
Name: The GreenZone
Description: Records observed Company Credits totals and shows weekly GC Seals tier progression, FC progress rings, and an optional overlay. Use /greenzone to open the window.
Changelog:
FC chest contributor reliability:
- Credits verified items added into a new empty FC chest slot.
- Fixes food and other separate-stack deposits syncing stock without contributor credit.
- Keeps existing FC chest stock sync behaviour unchanged.
